textPlain: Very cool.Would be interesting to hear why this over a general purpose text-based browser like Lynx.https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lynx_(web_browser)
It might be before your time, but if you want some bonus points emulate Ceefax:https://metro.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2015/12/51354070.jpg [edited]
I always like seeing new TUI tools, nice work!

If you actually try access bbc.co.uk using Lynx, you'll see it's just not a great experience. Most modern websites are not made with text-based browsers in mind at all, and the HTML (and other stuff) they are made of does not lend itself to easy or intuitive display in the terminal.This seems more akin to an RSS reader than a general web browser.

You don't want to get put on trial for computer misuse, do you?
https://www.theguardian.com/technology/blog/2005/oct/07/manf...
The link is payload, maybe you could link to a concrete image or some free search engine?
Me too! I found a few nice ones in the App Showcase page in the Ratatui website: https://ratatui.rs/showcase/apps/
